bullets: • Supervised learning involves training a model with labeled data to predict outcomes.
• Linear regression is a type of supervised learning used to predict numerical outputs.
• A training set consists of input (features) and output (target) variables for model training.
• Notation for data includes lowercase x for inputs and y for outputs, with superscripts to denote specific examples.
• The process of predicting a client's house price involves training a model on a dataset and using it to make predictions.
raw:
• Supervised learning involves training a model with labeled data to predict outcomes.
• Linear regression is a type of supervised learning used to predict numerical outputs.
• A training set consists of input (features) and output (target) variables for model training.
• Notation for data includes lowercase x for inputs and y for outputs, with superscripts to denote specific examples.
• The process of predicting a client's house price involves training a model on a dataset and using it to make predictions.
